description: Few-shot examples for email classification. Add POSITIVE examples to reinforce correct classification and NEGATIVE examples to clarify boundaries between similar categories.

examples.label: POSITIVE
examples.subject: Quotation Request - Sea Freight to Rotterdam
examples.body: Hi, we need a quote for shipping 3 x 20ft containers from Shenzhen to Rotterdam. Please include all surcharges and estimated total cost.
examples.note: 明确询价，包含起止港和数量

examples.label: POSITIVE
examples.subject: 请问运费报价
examples.body: 你好，我们想寄一批货物从上海到迪拜，大约5吨，请问最低运费是多少？有什么优惠？
examples.note: 中文询价，询问单价

examples.label: NEGATIVE
examples.subject: 运费什么时候到账
examples.body: 上次付的运费已经转给你们了，什么时候能确认收款？
examples.note: 反例：说的是付款确认，应归 billing_invoice，不是询价

examples.label: POSITIVE
examples.subject: Cancel Order ORD882341
examples.body: Please cancel my order ORD882341. I no longer need the shipment. Please process refund to my account.
examples.note: 明确取消+退款

examples.label: POSITIVE
examples.subject: 申请退款
examples.body: 您好，由于货物损坏严重无法使用，我们要求全额退款并取消后续订单，请告知退款流程。
examples.note: 货损引发退款申请，核心意图是取消和退款

examples.label: NEGATIVE
examples.subject: 货物损坏
examples.body: 我们的货在运输途中被压坏了，包装破损，请帮我们处理，但不需要退款，重新发一批就可以。
examples.note: 反例：货损但要求重发不退款，应归 shipping_exception

examples.label: POSITIVE
examples.subject: Where is my order ORD556123?
examples.body: Hi, I placed an order last week (ORD556123) and haven't received any tracking update. Can you check the current status?
examples.note: 查询具体订单当前状态

examples.label: POSITIVE
examples.subject: 物流单号查询
examples.body: 请问我的货到哪了？快递单号是SF1234567890，已经三天了没动静。
examples.note: 查物流动态，含单号

examples.label: NEGATIVE
examples.subject: 几天能到
examples.body: 你好，我刚下单，请问从深圳到新加坡大概要几天？
examples.note: 反例：问的是时长而非当前状态，应归 shipping_time

examples.label: POSITIVE
examples.subject: ETA for Air Freight to Dubai
examples.body: We urgently need to know the estimated transit time for air freight from Guangzhou to Dubai. Our customer deadline is next Friday.
examples.note: 询问预计时长/ETA，尚未下单

examples.label: POSITIVE
examples.subject: 海运到美国要多久
examples.body: 请问从宁波港海运到洛杉矶港一般需要多少天？走快船还是普通船？
examples.note: 询问运输天数，通用咨询

examples.label: NEGATIVE
examples.subject: ETA update for ORD991
examples.body: My order ORD991 was supposed to arrive on Monday but tracking shows it's still in Singapore. What happened?
examples.note: 反例：已有具体订单且出现延误异常，应归 shipping_exception

examples.label: POSITIVE
examples.subject: Shipment Delayed - ORD334
examples.body: Our shipment ORD334 was due to arrive 5 days ago but is still stuck at Hamburg customs. We have already incurred penalty charges from our buyer. Please advise immediately.
examples.note: 延误+损失，异常已发生

examples.label: POSITIVE
examples.subject: 货物损坏投诉
examples.body: 收到货后发现外包装严重破损，里面的电子元件有明显撞击痕迹，拍照存证已发送。请安排赔偿或补发。
examples.note: 货物损坏异常，要求处理

examples.label: NEGATIVE
examples.subject: 快递查询
examples.body: 请问单号SF999的快递现在到哪里了？
examples.note: 反例：只是查询状态没有提及异常，应归 order_tracking

examples.label: POSITIVE
examples.subject: Invoice INV-2024-089 Issue
examples.body: The invoice you sent has the wrong company name. Our legal name is ABC Trading Co. Ltd, not ABC Trading. Please reissue the invoice with the correct information.
examples.note: 发票信息错误要求重开

examples.label: POSITIVE
examples.subject: 付款确认
examples.body: 您好，我们已于今天下午通过T/T转账支付了订单ORD221的尾款，金额USD 8,500，请确认收款并安排发货。
examples.note: 付款确认，账单类

examples.label: NEGATIVE
examples.subject: 退款申请
examples.body: 货物已退回，请尽快退款到原银行卡。
examples.note: 反例：退款本质是 order_cancellation 的后续，非发票账单问题

examples.label: POSITIVE
examples.subject: Microsoft 365 subscription renewal
examples.body: Your Microsoft 365 subscription is due to renew on April 30. Click here to manage your subscription or payment method.
examples.note: 系统订阅通知，非业务

examples.label: POSITIVE
examples.subject: 假期通知
examples.body: 通知全体员工：五一假期为5月1日至5日，请提前安排好工作交接。如有紧急事务请联系部门负责人。
examples.note: 内部通知，非客户业务邮件
